query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Govt committed to passing oil price relief to consumers: Ali Pervaiz Malik
articles.description: ISLAMABAD: Federal Minister for Petroleum Ali Pervaiz Malik on Saturday reaffirmed that the government remains committed to passing on the impact of fluctuations in international oil prices to consumers, while fulfilling all international obligations, rejecting perceptions of preferential treatment in fuel pricing decisions.

articles.title: Market Prediction For Monday, June 29: Will Nifty Cross 24,200? West Asia, Crude Oil, Monsoon, FII Flows In Focus
articles.description: Analysts say investors will closely track West Asia developments, crude oil prices, FII flows, monsoon progress and the key 24,200 level on the Nifty for directional cues.

articles.title: Oil costs’ fall buoys Wall Street dragged by AI losses
articles.description: NEW YORK -- Most of the U.S. stock market rose Friday after oil prices eased back to where they were before the war with Iran, but drops for stocks swept up in the mania around artificial intelligence technology kept the market in check.

articles.title: Oil prices tumble over 3% as Strait of Hormuz shipping eases supply fears
articles.description: Oil prices fell more than 3% and posted steep weekly losses as tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz increased, easing supply concerns despite a cargo ship attack near Oman, while markets also weighed expectations of stronger global crude supplies.

articles.title: Oil prices fall to pre-war levels but well-stocked India unlikely to lap up Iran crude
articles.description: New Delhi has been snapping up oil from countries around the world and has now fully met its needs for July and the first half of August

articles.title: Two-year yields dip as Hormuz flows rise, hopes on inflation grow
articles.description: Treasury yields dipped Friday as falling oil prices, linked to increased Strait of Hormuz shipments, sparked hopes of easing inflation. While the Federal Reserve remains watchful of price pressures, traders are assessing the likelihood of future rate hikes. Despite some hawkish signals from policymakers, the prevailing sentiment suggests a pause in rate increases, with economists largely expecting rates to hold steady this year.

articles.title: Stocks to buy below ₹100: Mehul Kothari of Anand Rathi recommends three shares to buy or sell
articles.description: Next week, Bank Nifty's trading range is set between 57,000 and 59,000, with breakouts suggesting future trends. Analyst Mehul Kothari advises buying Trident, UCO Bank, and MMTC under ₹100, as the Indian market remains strong amid mixed signals and easing crude oil prices.

articles.title: Dollar declines for second straight day but set for weekly gain
articles.description: The dollar dipped for a second day as easing inflation and falling oil prices tempered expectations for Federal Reserve rate hikes. Despite this pullback, the greenback remains strong for the week and month. Meanwhile, the yen hovers near a critical level, raising intervention concerns. Analysts suggest a cautious approach to the dollar against the yen ahead of key U.S. jobs data.
